US Secretary of Agriculture Brooke Rollins, along with Representative Rob [...]
shorts.content_distilled: SCOTT TOWNSHIP, LACKAWANNA COUNTY  — Farmers hit hard this season are now pushing for help: Lawmakers rolled out two major relief plans in Lackawanna County after April's frost.

shorts.title: Two NEPA natives head to Scripps National Spelling Bee
shorts.title_distilled: Two NEPA natives head to Scripps National Spelling Bee.
shorts.description: (WBRE/WYOU) — The Scripps National Spelling Bee is underway in our nation's capital on Tuesday. After a long run at a convention center in the suburbs of Maryland, the bee returns to the Constitution Hall near the White House. 247 contestants are competing through multiple rounds, leading up to the finals on Thursday night. Our [...]
